title: KDNA Envelope AEAD
description: JSON Schema for the kdna.envelope.aead envelope (RFC-0018). Defines the shape, required fields, and the per-slot kdf_profile contract. The on-the-wire canonical form is CBOR (RFC 8949, deterministic encoding); this schema describes the JSON presentation form used in test vectors and developer tooling. The two forms MUST be byte-equivalent under CBOR canonical encoding.

profile.description: Profile identifier. MUST be the literal string 'kdna.envelope.aead'. Any other value triggers KDNA_ENVELOPE_PROFILE_UNSUPPORTED.

profile_version.description: Compatibility coordinate for this envelope profile.

alg.description: AEAD algorithm. Frozen to AES-256-GCM. Future AEADs require a new profile ID (the non-collapse invariant).

key_wrapping.description: CEK wrapping algorithm per RFC 3394. Frozen to AES-256-KW.

kdf_profile.description: KDF profile for the primary (first) key slot. MUST match the first entry's key_slots[].kdf_profile. Per-slot kdf_profile is the contract; this top-level field is a convenience copy. Readers MUST use the per-slot value, not this top-level field.

key_slots.description: At least one key slot. Each slot describes one way to unwrap the CEK. The CEK is wrapped once and the same wrapped bytes are referenced by every slot.

iv.description: Base64 of the 12-byte (96-bit) AES-GCM nonce. MUST be unique per (CEK, slot) pair. GCM nonce reuse with the same key is catastrophic.

tag.description: Base64 of the 16-byte AES-GCM authentication tag. A reader MUST verify this tag against the AAD constructed per RFC-0018 R5.

ciphertext.description: Base64 of the encrypted payload. Variable length; GCM is a stream cipher so no padding.

slot.description: Opaque slot name for human readability (e.g. 'password', 'recovery', 'account-grant-1'). The contract is in kdf_profile and kdf_params, not in this string.

kdf_profile.description: KDF profile for this slot. Readers MUST use this value, not the envelope-level kdf_profile. The non-collapse invariant requires a reader to fail with KDNA_KDF_UNSUPPORTED if this value is not supported AND no other slot offers a supported KDF.

kdf_params.description: KDF-specific parameters. The shape depends on the slot's kdf_profile (scrypt-sha256 needs N/r/p/salt; argon2id needs t/m/p/salt). The application layer MUST verify that the params match the kdf_profile; this schema accepts both shapes and lets the consumer pick.

wrap.description: Key-wrapping algorithm for the CEK. Frozen to AES-256-KW.

wrapped_key.description: Base64 of the 40-byte AES-256-KW output for a 32-byte CEK. Same bytes across all slots of the same envelope.

N.description: scrypt cost parameter. RFC-0018 freezes N=32768 for the current scrypt profile; this range allows future minor upward adjustments under the same profile ID.

r.description: scrypt block size. RFC-0018 freezes r=8 for the current scrypt profile.

p.description: scrypt parallelization. RFC-0018 freezes p=1 for the current scrypt profile.

salt.description: Base64 of the 16-byte (128-bit) random salt. MUST be unique per slot.

t.description: Argon2id time cost. RFC-0018 freezes t=3 for the Argon2id profile.

m.description: Argon2id memory cost in KiB. RFC-0018 freezes m=65536 (64 MiB) for the Argon2id profile. A reader that sees m below 65536 MUST reject with KDNA_KDF_PARAMS_INVALID.

p.description: Argon2id parallelism (lanes). RFC-0018 freezes p=4 for the Argon2id profile.

dkLen.description: Argon2id output length in bytes. RFC-0018 freezes dkLen=32 for the Argon2id profile.

salt.description: Base64 of the 16-byte (128-bit) random salt. MUST be unique per slot.
